zh.Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England: 英國肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾
zh.Sefton, Lancashire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton於1210年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親Adam de Molyneux25歲，母親Letitia de Brinley21歲。他於大約1229年與Margaret Thorne在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1289年在英國肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾享年79歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England: 英国肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton于1210年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲Adam de Molyneux25岁，母亲Letitia de Brinley21岁。他于大约1229年与Margaret Thorne在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1289年在英国肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾享年79岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton was born in 1210, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, Adam de Molyneux, was 25 and his mother, Letitia de Brinley, was 21. He married Margaret Thorne about 1229, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1289, in Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton est né en 1210, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Molyneux, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Letitia de Brinley, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Thorne environ 1229, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1289, à Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton 1210 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Molyneux 25 und seine Mutter Letitia de Brinley 21. Er hat um 1229 in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Thorne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1289 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton è nato il nel 1210 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Adam de Molyneux, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Letitia de Brinley, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Thorne circa 1229, nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1289, nel Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Molyneux Lord of Seftonが1210年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Adam de Molyneuxは25歳，母Letitia de Brinleyは21歳であった。約1229年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでMargaret Thorneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1289年にイギリスケントカンテルブリー カスエドラルで79歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリー カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton(이)가 1210년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Molyneux(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Letitia de Brinley(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1229년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Margaret Thorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1289년 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캐테드럴에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

mn.Sefton, Lancashire, England, United King: Sefton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton nasceu em 1210, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Molyneux, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Letitia de Brinley, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Thorne aproximadamente 1229, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1289, em Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton родился в 1210 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam de Molyneux было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Letitia de Brinley, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Thorne около 1229 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1289 г. в местности кантирбури кэтедраль, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности кантирбури кэтедраль, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton nació en 1210, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Molyneux, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Letitia de Brinley, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Thorne aproximadamente 1229, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1289, en Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inglaterra.
